name: VkLogicOp
usage: الوصف الرسمي لهذا التعداد: Framebuffer logical operations.

Logical operations هي controlled by the logicOpEnable and logicOp members of VkPipelineColorBlendStateCreateInfo. The logicOpEnable state can also be controlled by vkCmdSetLogicOpEnableEXT if graphics pipeline هو created with VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_LOGIC_OP_ENABLE_EXT set in VkPipelineDynamicStateCreateInfo :: pDynamicStates. The logicOp state can also be controlled by vkCmdSetLogicOpEXT if graphics pipeline هو created with VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_LOGIC_OP_EXT set in VkPipelineDynamicStateCreateInfo :: pDynamicStates. If logicOpEnable هو VK_TRUE , then a logical operation selected by logicOp هو applied between each color attachment and the fragment’s corresponding output value, and blending of all attachments هو treated as if it were disabled. Any attachments using color formats لـ which logical operations هي not supported simply pass through the color values unmodified. The logical operation هو applied independently لـ each of the red, green, blue, and alpha components. The logicOp هو selected from the following operations:.
توضح القيم المعرفة داخل VkLogicOp السلوك الفعلي الذي سيُقرأ من الحقل أو البنية أو الدالة التي تستقبل هذا التعداد.
notes: تظهر بعض القيم في هذا التعداد عبر الامتدادات التالية: VK_VERSION_1_0.
